# Donation acknowledgment template

**Economics of Generative AI Research Lab**

Date: `[DATE]`

Dear `[DONOR NAME]`,

Thank you for your contribution to `Economics of Generative AI Research Lab` in the amount of `$[AMOUNT]` received on `[DATE]`.

No goods or services were provided in exchange for this contribution, other than intangible religious benefits, if any.

`[OR, IF SOMETHING WAS PROVIDED: The estimated fair market value of goods or services provided in exchange for this contribution was $[AMOUNT].]`

Your support helps advance educational and scientific research on the economics of generative artificial intelligence and related technologies.

Sincerely,

`[NAME]`

`[TITLE]`
